headline: Will a DT/TMUS merger really go ahead?
summary: Investing.com -- Deutsche Telekom’s recent share price decline appears overdone, according to UBS, which argues that investor concerns over a potential merger with T-Mobile US and rising competition in the U.S. wireless market have overshadowed the company’s strong operating performance.
